'''Grandon Holleck''' was [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

A veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the aging Governor Holleck performed poorly in his post, proving ill-equipped to deal with Chandrilan [[Politics/Legends|politics]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] forced Holleck's departure and replaced him with [[Gerald Weizel]], a protégé of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]] who displayed far more subtlety and political savvy than Holleck.<ref name="SR:14">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> Holleck retired to the planet [[Ganthel/Legends|Ganthel]].
